activities.details: I finally felt ready to face Rasial in immortal combat and destroyed his physical body. At least he was true to his word, and freed his army of enthralled souls back to Um.
I killed  An ancient threat: Rasial, the First Necromancer.
activities.text: I killed  Rasial, the First Necromancer.

activities.details: I killed  A phantom born from the God Wars: Hermod, the Spirit of War.
activities.text: I killed  Hermod, the Spirit of War.

activities.details: I worked with a former student of Rasial's, the infamous Lord Yudura, and learned about how power can be consolidated from rituals.
activities.text: Quest complete: Remains of the Necrolord

activities.details: I listened to Skaldrun's saga of Moia, the half-Mahjarrat daughter of Lucien, and her descent into Daemonheim.
I listened to Skaldrun's saga of Moia, the half-Mahjarrat daughter of Lucien, and her descent into Daemonheim.

I killed 5 boss monsters   called:  Har'Lakk the Riftsplitter , a rammernaut , Lexicus Runewright and Stomp in Daemonheim.
activities.text: I killed 5 boss monsters in Daemonheim.
